subject: A large green-grey spider crouched amid scattered armored corpses in a dim forest clearing; pale fungal caps grow on its back; two cloaked witches loom in the misty background
description: A large spider crouches in a moss-strewn forest clearing, its segmented body covered in pale mushroom caps. Skulls and broken armor litter the ground around it — the aftermath of a battle the spider seems to have won. In the misty background two cloaked, conical-hatted witch silhouettes are barely visible between trees. Palette is mossy greens and bruised browns; mood is grim and fairy-tale-dark.
foreground: A spider with mushroom-covered carapace amid scattered armored skeletons and skulls on a forest floor
background: Misty forest with two cloaked witch silhouettes wearing pointed hats
